raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased a XXXX XXXX for {$1600.00} using my Best Buy credit card. I returned that TV on XX/XX/XXXX and exchanged it for another model, as shown in my receipt dated XX/XX/XXXX. 

Despite the return, the {$1600.00} charge was never reversed, and my account still reflects both the returned TV and the new purchase of {$1700.00}. This means I was overcharged for merchandise I no longer have, effectively paying for two televisions when only one was kept.

Citibank and Best Buy have pointed to unrelated smaller refunds ( {$840.00}, {$380.00}, {$200.00} ), but those do not resolve the fact that the full {$1600.00} was never credited back. 

I am requesting that the {$1600.00} charge be reversed immediately so that I am billed only for the one TV I retained.
